display_description.he: חיפוש מידע על חברות ברשם החברות ובדיקת עוסקים מורשים
display_description.en: Look up Israeli company information and understand business entity types. Use when user asks about Israeli companies, "chevra", business registration, "Rasham HaChevarot", company numbers, entity types, or needs to register a business in Israel. Covers Ltd companies, partnerships, non-profits (amuta), cooperatives, and sole proprietors. Do NOT use for non-Israeli corporate registries or stock market analysis.
